Minor'S Compromise In Scd. #218 At 9:00 A.M.
Off Calendar Sep-04-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR. Leticia Perez.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Petitioner, Leticia Gazmuri the guardian ad litem and Esther Luna, a minor also present.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Medical expenses of $6,310.02
Attorney's fees and costs of $6,180.64 payable to Kuvara Law Firm.
A net balance of $10,067.34 to be deposited into a blocked account with
Bank Of America, Railroad Ave., Pittsburg, CA.
until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in open court.
